title: dortmanna brevifolia
intro: Dortmanna brevifolia, also known as dwarf horsetail, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Equisetaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to reduce swelling, relieve urinary issues, and support kidney function. The health benefits of Dortmanna brevifolia include its ability to promote digestive health, reduce blood pressure, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
